title: GNO Process Status
description: Status of a detached gno serve or daemon process, reported by --status --json

running.description: Whether a live matching process was found via pid-file + liveness probe

pid.description: Process ID from the pid-file, or null when no pid-file exists

port.description: Listening port (serve only). Always null for daemon.

cmd.description: Which command the status is reporting on

version.description: GNO version recorded when the process was started; null when no pid-file exists

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the detached process was started; null when no pid-file exists

uptime_seconds.description: Seconds since started_at, computed at status-read time; null when not running

pid_file.description: Absolute path to the pid-file that was consulted

log_file.description: Absolute path to the log-file the detached process writes to

log_size_bytes.description: Current size of the log-file in bytes, or null when the file does not exist
